edgms:educationalDigitalGame:
```
Minecraft: Education Edition
Mojang Studios
Microsoft
Minecraft: Education Edition is an education-focused sandbox game in which students build structures, explore virtual environments, solve problems, and complete teacher-designed lessons. It supports classroom activities in STEM, coding, creativity, collaboration, and project-based learning.
en ko
2016
Science Computer Science General
Elementary School (K-5) Middle School (6-8) High School (9-12)
Students will be able to apply creativity, collaboration, problem-solving, and basic computational thinking skills through project-based activities in a sandbox game environment.
Sandbox
Windows macOS iOS
Single-player Cooperative Multiplayer Classroom-wide
Explicitly Educational Game
Active
Institutional License ```
